name: House of Terror
short_description: Do you have what it takes to survive the House of Terror? Step inside… if you dare.
detailed_description:
House of Terror

Prepare yourself for an intense and heart-pounding survival experience in House of Terror, a game designed for only the bravest souls. Trapped inside a haunted mansion with a sinister presence lurking in the shadows, your ultimate mission is to locate and claim the hidden treasure box. But beware—the terrifying, vengeful granny is always on the hunt, patrolling the eerie corridors, waiting for the slightest sound to pounce.

Armed with only a weak flashlight, you must navigate through dark, unsettling hallways filled with chilling surprises and obstacles. Every creaking floorboard and misplaced step could alert the relentless granny, forcing you into a desperate fight for survival. Stay silent, stay hidden, and use your intelligence to outmaneuver her while solving puzzles and uncovering secrets that will lead you to your goal.

Can you keep your composure and escape with the treasure, or will you become another lost soul trapped within the House of Terror?

Game Features:

  • Terrifying Levels – Each area is filled with sinister secrets and nightmarish surprises.

  • Stealth & Strategy – Stay quiet, hide, and use your wits to avoid detection.

  • Treasure Hunt Mystery – Solve puzzles and uncover the truth behind the haunted house.

  • Immersive Horror Atmosphere – Spine-chilling sound effects and eerie visuals that keep you on edge.

Do you have what it takes to survive the House of Terror? Step inside… if you dare.
